## How to verify

- [ ] `cargo check --workspace --exclude desktop-ui-tauri`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --exclude desktop-ui-tauri`
- [ ] `cd apps/desktop-ui && bun run check`
- [ ] `cd apps/desktop-ui && bun run lint`
- [ ] `cd apps/desktop-ui && bun run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and minimal
- [ ] No secrets or machine-local paths introduced
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
